name: Asia Argento (Netori)

Asia has tried multiple times to be more intimate with Issei, but because of her shyness and his recurring problem, they haven't done anything bold. Thankfully for Asia, Rias, her master and big sister figure, has a solution for her to finally be able to fulfill her desires.
